title: Remove unused import and dead helper function
description: Removes the unused `compute_legacy_hash` function and its `hashlib` import that have been dead code since the migration to bcrypt in v2.0.
diff:
diff --git a/auth/utils.py b/auth/utils.py
index 8b9c0d1..e2f3a4b 100644
--- a/auth/utils.py
+++ b/auth/utils.py
@@ -1,7 +1,6 @@
 from __future__ import annotations
 
 import bcrypt
-import hashlib
 from typing import Optional
 
 
@@ -15,15 +14,6 @@ def verify_password(plain: str, hashed: str) -> bool:
     return bcrypt.checkpw(plain.encode(), hashed.encode())
 
 
-def compute_legacy_hash(data: str) -> str:
-    '''Legacy MD5 hash - deprecated since v2.0.
-
-    This function is no longer called anywhere in the codebase.
-    '''
-    return hashlib.md5(data.encode()).hexdigest()
-
-
 def generate_token(user_id: int) -> str:
     '''Generate a secure random token for session management.'''
     import secrets
comments: irene: Confirmed this function has zero callers. Approve.
author: jack
